title: RAGAPHENE: A RAG Annotation Platform with Human Enhancements and Edits
authors: Not specified in the provided text
abstract: RAGaphene is a chat-based annotation platform for building multi-turn RAG benchmarks. It enables users to have conversations with an LLM that are grounded in existing corpora to ensure faithfulness.

features: Ability to edit both relevant passages and outputs
Integration with various retrievers and generators

key_contributions: RAGaphene: A RAG annotation chat platform with integration to many retrievers and generators
Enhanced user feedback including adjusting passage retrieval and improving/repairing responses
limitations_of_existing_platforms: BasicAI, HumanSignal, LabelBox, Joko et al.: Have basic features for annotating conversational data but don't support creating conversational multi-turn RAG datasets with real-time agent response generation
First-Aid platform: Has real-time agent response generation and editing but lacks other feedback mechanisms and doesn't incorporate a retrieval component
